Groups work to open government records

Rosemary Armao IRE Executive Director November 1996
Investigative MethodsHealth & EnvironmentData & Databases

Journalistic organizations are collaborating to overcome significant barriers obstructing access to information under the FOIA. Key issues include lengthy processing times, exclusion of Congress and c...

Journalistic organizations are collaborating to overcome significant barriers obstructing access to information under the FOIA. Key issues include lengthy processing times, exclusion of Congress and certain presidential agencies from FOIA, and public indifference toward open-access initiatives. Proposals for remedy include increasing penalties for non-compliance, closing FOIA loopholes, and enhancing public awareness of the importance of accessible information.

These initiatives aim to ensure better use and expansion of FOIA, ultimately facilitating more profound public scrutiny of government activities.
